summary: Tested 'Extras available for purchase' feature for activities. All backend API tests passed (9/9). Frontend testing verified: Admin Dashboard Extras tab works correctly with add/remove/vehicle pricing functionality. Trip Builder shows extras as checkboxes when activity with extras is added to a day.

issues: Hydration errors in HTML: <span> cannot be child of <tbody>/<tr>/<select>/<option> - these are React hydration warnings that should be addressed

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings in console - <span> elements being rendered inside <tbody>, <tr>, <select>, <option> elements. This is likely from the visual editor wrapper spans. Should be addressed to prevent hydration mismatches.
seed_data_creation: Added 3 extras to 'Full Day Tbilisi City Tour' activity (Wine Tasting Experience, Traditional Georgian Lunch, Narikala Cable Car Ride) and 3 extras to 'Desert Safari with BBQ Dinner' activity (Quad Bike Ride, Camel Ride Experience, VIP Seating Area)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Activity Extras feature is fully implemented and working. Backend API supports extras field in POST/PUT/GET /api/activities. Admin Dashboard has Extras tab in ActivityEditForm for managing extras per activity. Trip Builder DayCard shows 'Extras available for purchase' section with checkboxes when activity has extras. Test activities with extras: 'Full Day Tbilisi City Tour' (a77cadb3-a72d-4cf7-a25d-6a931781d73d) and 'Desert Safari with BBQ Dinner' (7284156f-958f-4dde-b296-3acbe375af72).

backend: Activity without extras returns empty array - PASSED
Extras with vehicle_pricing stored correctly - PASSED
Minimal extra fields (name, price) accepted - PASSED
Full extra fields (id, name, description, price, vehicle_pricing) stored - PASSED
frontend_admin: Activity edit form has 'Extras' tab - VERIFIED
Can add extras with name, price, description fields - VERIFIED
Can toggle vehicle-based pricing per extra - VERIFIED
Can remove extras with delete button - VERIFIED
Saving activity with extras persists to database - VERIFIED
frontend_trip_builder: DayCard shows 'Extras available for purchase' section when activity has extras - VERIFIED
Extras show as checkboxes with name, description, and price - VERIFIED
Activity card shows '3 extras' badge - VERIFIED
